content.en:
"Now that the Ten Pivot Gold Plate is in hand, you can comprehend the rules of the dimension faster!"

Afterwards.

Ye Tian used the Ten Pivot Gold Plate to comprehend the dimensional rules of the Supreme Treasure Black Statue, and continued to create the fourth layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body.

After hundreds of thousands of extradimensional eras, the fourth layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body was finally created by him.

And so.

Ye Tian used the multi-dimensional wisdom light of the fourth layer of the Jiaye wisdom body and the Ten Pivot Golden Plate to comprehend the dimensional rule treasure, and his efficiency far exceeded that of the past.

According to this efficiency, at most 100 million extradimensional epochs, he can completely comprehend the rules of the sevenfold dimension.

Time flies.

Ye Tian's dimensional rules are rapidly improving, and he is also always paying attention to the situation of the extradimensional territory.

During this period of time, the multi-dimensional tribulation creatures of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation were born one after another, and various treasures were also born one after another, and the killings were very frequent, and the headquarters of the overlord-level forces had been breached, resulting in the destruction of the overlord-level forces, and only those few Fifth Realms had successfully escaped.

There are also fifth-realm extra-dimensional realms that are very unlucky, and they encounter that kind of terrifying fifth-realm multi-dimensional catastrophe creatures, and they are directly killed.

There were also multi-dimensional catastrophe creatures from the fifth realm who came to Ye Tian, but they were directly killed by Ye Tian.

For now, he doesn't have much trouble here.

......

Territory 4506.

A treasure tree was born here, which took root and continued to grow throughout the tenth dimension.

Soon, a fifth realm discovered this place and wanted to seize this treasure tree.

Because they approached here, they found that cultivation had become easier, and this treasure tree actually had the effect of accelerating cultivation, and it was also full of fruits, which might be able to greatly improve the cultivation of the fifth realm.

However, there are also some Death Multidimensional Tribulation creatures that also gather around, waiting for the fruit to ripen.

On the side of the Four Thousand Realm, the top Fifth Realm was all moved.

If such a treasure is captured, it can definitely greatly increase the strength of the force!

But the fruit is not ripe yet, and there is no point in snatching it now.

So, they continued to wait.

Anyway, there is no Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life yet, they still dare to fight and snatch some fruits, if they can snatch this treasure tree, it will be even better.

In the blink of an eye, another 10 million extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

The fruit is about to ripen.

For the first time, an existence at the peak of the Fifth Realm came here, including the Lord of the Luo Qing Realm.

These extra-dimensional realms of the fifth realm don't say a word, just do it.

"Kill~!"

These Fifth Realm and Multidimensional Tribulation creatures are slaughtering each other in order to snatch the ripe fruit.

Thundered!!!!

The battle was fierce, but fortunately they all deliberately avoided this treasure tree, otherwise this treasure tree would have been affected.

Soon.

A Fifth Realm relied on a strange multi-dimensional mastery, came to the treasure tree in an instant, grabbed a few fruits and fled, he didn't dare to covet more fruits, otherwise he would definitely die.

There are also multi-dimensional catastrophe creatures that bite a fruit and swallow it directly.

At a time when the battle is so fierce and the snatching of fruits is extremely crazy.

Sword filaments slashed from the tenth dimension.

Puff puff puff!!

One by one, the multidimensional catastrophe creatures were slain, and then the blade directly cut the treasure tree from the deepest part of the root system.

Then.

A figure crossed over from the tenth dimension, grabbing the treasure tree with one hand.

"Leave the treasure tree behind!"

One by one, the Fifth Realm instinctively roared.

But as Ye Tian's hand shook them away, it calmed them down.

These Fifth Realms don't dare to do anything.

But those multi-dimensional tribulation creatures still dared to make a move, and then Ye Tianyi waved his hand, and the dense sword silk killed these multi-dimensional tribulation creatures of the fifth realm one after another.

The Five Realms are supremely unlearned, with the rules of the Six Dimensions.

Ye Tian could already kill this group of Fifth Realm Multi-Dimensional Tribulation creatures in an instant.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Those Fifth Realm people were so frightened that they ran away, where did they dare to stay here!

......

"How could the strength of the Ye Tian Realm Lord be so terrifying, the supreme mastery of the five realms, the rules of the six dimensions, this is much stronger than the last time we besieged him!"

Luo Qing Realm Lord said in fear.

If Ye Tian wanted to kill him, one move could instantaneously kill him.

Fortunately, Ye Tian didn't attack him, and probably regarded him as an ant and disdained to kill him.

And after this battle, those Fifth Realm people all knew Ye Tian's strength, the invincible combat power of the Fifth Realm.

There was even a fifth realm that wanted to take refuge in Ye Tian, but Ye Tian refused.

Red Flame Dragons.

In the void shrouded by countless formations.

Weimu Chilong also heard rumors from the outside world, which were rumors about Ye Tian.

"The Ye Tian Realm Lord is already invincible in the fifth realm?"

"I have comprehended the supreme mastery of the Five Realms, comprehended the rules of the sixfold dimension, and comprehended the soul will of the eleventh dimension ......"

"Hey, this is enough to be comparable to the legendary Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon was shocked.

He originally thought that Ye Tian's strength was only at the top in the fifth realm, but he didn't expect it to be invincible.

I have to say that it is too normal for the Red Demon Realm Lord of the Red Flame Dragon Clan to be defeated, if it weren't for Ye Tian's mercy, he would have been able to kill the Red Demon Realm Lord in one move in an instant.

......

A mysterious place.

The Extinction Realm Lord opened his eyes: "The Fifth Realm Lord of the Ye Heaven Realm is invincible?, what a demon, if you want to catch up with him, you can't do it at all!"

Immediately, he closed his eyes and continued to cultivate.

And the aura on his body is already the fifth realm!

If Ye Tian knew that the Extinction Realm Lord had broken through to the Fifth Realm, he would probably be very surprised.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian often killed some of the Fifth Realm's multi-dimensional catastrophe creatures, and (Li Zhao) snatched more and more treasures.

The treasures that can be born in the Death Multidimensional Tribulation are not ordinary treasures, and they are all of great help to the Fifth Realm, and many of them can improve their cultivation.

For example, the kind of treasure tree that was snatched last time can help improve cultivation, and its fruit can even improve the cultivation of the fifth realm, and the effect is very good.

Ye Tian placed this treasure tree in the Thirteen Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Supreme Treasure Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, so that those human races could cultivate around this treasure tree, and the cultivation and improvement speed would be very fast.

The transcendent realm of the first realm can easily raise cultivation to the peak realm of the first realm.

And Ye Tian used those fruits to continuously improve his cultivation, maybe it wouldn't be too long before he could raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the fifth realm.

On this day of the 50,000,000th extradimensional epoch.

With the help of those fruits, Ye Tian finally raised his cultivation to the peak realm of the fifth realm, and his strength improved again.
